testcase.name: test_patch_full_squad_addons_persists_to_config

failure.message: AssertionError: BUG: PATCH /admin/full-squad/addons whitelist at server.py:3851 does NOT include 'gym_bag_addon_price' — got 4.0 assert 4.0 == 5.5 + where 4.0 = float(4.0) + where 4.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff3318af2c80>('gym_bag_addon_price') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff3318af2c80> = {'sleeve_print_price': 2.0, 'back_upload_print_price': 4.0, 'back_name_and_number_price': 6.0, 'gym_bag_addon_price': 4.0}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration28.py:175: in test_patch_full_squad_addons_persists_to_config assert float(addons.get("gym_bag_addon_price")) == 5.5, ( E AssertionError: BUG: PATCH /admin/full-squad/addons whitelist at server.py:3851 does NOT include 'gym_bag_addon_price' — got 4.0 E assert 4.0 == 5.5 E + where 4.0 = float(4.0) E + where 4.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff3318af2c80>('gym_bag_addon_price') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff3318af2c80> = {'sleeve_print_price': 2.0, 'back_upload_print_price': 4.0, 'back_name_and_number_price': 6.0, 'gym_bag_addon_price': 4.0}.get
